name: Sweet'n Sour Chicken (Crock Pot)
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Potatoes, peeled and sliced thinly
4 Chicken breasts (about 3 lb), skinned and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sliced potatoes in the Crock-Pot.
2. Arrange chicken breasts on top of the potatoes.
3. Combine orange juice, brown sugar, basil, nutmeg, and vinegar in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Sprinkle the chicken with dried parsley flakes.
6. Cover and cook on Low setting for 6 to 8 hours.
7. Remove chicken breasts and potatoes from the sauce and arrange them on a warm platter.
8. Turn the Crock-Pot to High setting.
9. Add peach slices to the sauce. Heat until serving temperature.
10. Pour the sauce over the chicken and potatoes.
11. Garnish with chopped parsley. Makes 8 servings (162 calories per serving).
